summary: Completed backend and frontend testing of Player CRUD API and PlayerEditorDialog integration. All 10 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend integration tests passed - add, edit, delete players all work correctly with API calls and UI refresh.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

passed_tests: GET /api/players - returns all players from database (24 seeded)
POST /api/players - adds new player to database with auto-generated ID and image
PUT /api/players/{id} - updates existing player and persists changes
PUT /api/players/{id} - returns 400 when no data provided
POST /api/squads/share - creates shareable code with OSTRA- prefix
GET /api/squads/{code} - retrieves shared squad by code
Frontend: App loads players from API on startup
Frontend: PlayerEditorDialog displays all players from API
Frontend: Add player form calls POST API and refreshes list
Frontend: Edit player form calls PUT API and refreshes list
Frontend: Delete player calls DELETE API and refreshes list
Frontend: Player count updates correctly after CRUD operations
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Add aria-describedby to DialogContent in PlayerEditorDialog for accessibility
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds 24 players if database is empty
context_for_next_testing_agent: Player CRUD API fully functional. PlayerEditorDialog integration complete. Previous iteration noted drag-and-drop issues with @dnd-kit - this is a separate concern from the player management feature tested here. All player data is now stored in MongoDB and shared across all users.
